character.name:
TRUE pixel art with OCTOPATH TRAVELER character sprite color 
palette and pixel detail level (HD-2D 16-bit JRPG style). 
STRICT FRONT-FACING POSE for 8-direction rotation.

POSE — ABSOLUTELY CRITICAL:
- SOUTH-FACING base sprite for 8-direction rotation
- Body facing the viewer, both wings spread symmetrically
- Wing tips equal width on both sides
- Hovering pose with slight forward lean

PROPORTIONS:
- Mid-size flying bat creature, wingspan ~1.5x body width
- Compact body with leathery membrane wings

FACE — BEAST MINIMALIST:
- Two SMALL DIM ORANGE GLOWING EYES set deep in face
- NO white sclera, just glowing pinpricks
- Sharp small fangs visible at the bottom of the snout (only fangs, 
  no mouth shape)
- Small flat nose visible (BEAST EXCEPTION — quadruped/animal allowed)

BODY AND EQUIPMENT:
- Charred black leathery skin with DIM ORANGE EMBER SEAMS across 
  the body and wing membranes (cooling lava look)
- Wings half-extended in mid-flight pose
- Small clawed feet tucked under
- Embers and soot trailing along wing edges (small clean ember 
  pixels, not random sparkles)

COLOR PALETTE:
- Dim ember orange seams and eye glow are the saturated accents
- Limited palette ~12 colors of charred black, dark gray, dim ember orange

RENDERING STYLE:
- Single black outline, no anti-aliasing, sharp pixel edges
- Basic flat shading, NO smooth gradients

CLEAN OUTPUT — STRICT:
★ CLEAN SOLID COLOR SHAPES ONLY
★ Ember pixels along wings are deliberate (clean shaped, not noise)
★ NO random white specks, NO sparkles outside designated ember areas
★ TRUE transparent PNG (alpha=0)
★ NO shadow (creature is flying)
